questions.q: It is a graphical control area Microsoft Office that organizes commands into tabs and groups for easy access and provides quick access to tools and commands. It is called?

questions.q: Learning in a natural environment, away from artificiality and focusing on nature based experiences is called?

questions.q: While arranging classroom space, what should a teacher keep in mind?

options: To remove all students seating arrangements
To place teacher's chair only at the back of the class
To place his/her chair in front of the class

questions.q: If a talented student misbehaves in class, what should the teacher do?
questions.urdu: اگر ایک ذہین طالب علم کلاس میں بدتمیزی کرے تو استاد کو کیا کرنا چاہیے؟
options: Punish the student in front of everyone

questions.q: A teacher assigns a paragraph to a student to read and then asks the student to retell it in his own words. This activity is an example of?
questions.urdu: ایک استاد ایک طالب علم کو ایک پیراگراف پڑھنے کے لیے دیتا ہے اور پھر اس سے کہتا ہے کہ وہ اسے اپنے الفاظ میں دوبارہ بیان کرے۔ یہ سرگرمی کس کی مثال ہے؟

questions.q: The process of choosing the most suitable candidate from a pool of applicants is called?

questions.q: The process of developing employees skills, knowledge, abilities and attitudes through training, education and career development to improve organizational performance is called?

questions.q: The process of planning, organizing, directing and controlling financial resources of an organization to achieve it's objectives efficiently is called?

A valid test is always reliable
A valid test is usually reliable
